title: There's something in the caves
description: A mod that adds a dangerous mob in the Caves
body:
"There's something in the caves" is a mod that adds a very dangerous mob in Lush Caves called "The Unknown"

He is a mob that spawns only in Lush Caves, and can kill the player instantly with a Jumpscare if he gets too close.


**Geckolib is required to play this mod**
